auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue to your academic workspace.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join Cortex and start building your academic second brain.
auth.signOutSubtitle: End your current session on this device.

messages.checkEmail: Account created. Check your email to verify your account.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.title: One place for notes, course data, and verification.
hero.titleSignedIn: Pick up where your semester left off.
hero.subtitle: Capture notes, find course material fast, and keep your academic profile in sync without bouncing between scattered tools.
hero.subtitleSignedIn: Your workspace is ready. Resume writing, browse resources, or finish verification in a couple of clicks.

panel.title: Start where the app actually helps.
panel.subtitle: Cortex is built around the three actions students repeat most.

notes.label: Notes
notes.detail: Capture lectures, summaries, and revision lists.

data.label: Resources
data.detail: Find lectures, exams, and assignments by major.

profile.label: Verification
profile.detail: Finish your academic profile and ask for review.

notes.title: Notes that stay close to the work
notes.description: Write fast, organize cleanly, and return to the exact idea you need.

data.title: Course data that matches the semester
data.description: Browse material by major and year without wandering through a generic file dump.

profile.title: Verification with a clear path
profile.description: Know where to request review instead of hunting for a hidden admin queue.

sections.title: It should feel like a student workspace, not a marketing site.
sections.subtitle: Every surface is there to help students start faster, understand faster, and keep their academic context current.

descriptions.0: Open the note workspace first, not an empty editor teaser.
descriptions.1: Go straight to course material instead of generic landing content.
descriptions.2: Move from profile setup to admin review without confusion.

dataPage.title: Find the right course material in seconds.
dataPage.subtitle: Use focused filters to narrow by major, year, and keyword, then open a course to access lectures, exams, and assignments.

filters.title: Refine results
filters.helper: Start broad, then narrow down to exactly what you need.
filters.searchLabel: Search by course name or code

results.summary: {count, plural, =0 {No matching courses} one {# matching course} other {# matching courses}}

empty.title: No courses match this filter set
empty.description: Try removing one filter or using a broader keyword to explore more resources.

courses.noDescription: No description is available for this course yet.

ai.title: General AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Ask about any topic, not only your notes.
ai.empty: Start with a question and I will respond here.

profileSetup.title: Set up your academic profile
profileSetup.subtitle: Choose your university path so Cortex can tailor notes and resources.
profileSetup.verificationHint: Need verification? Open your profile page after saving.

errors.generic: Failed to save your profile. Please try again.

profilePage.title: Your profile
profilePage.subtitle: Keep your academic context updated and request verification from here.

verification.title: Verification status
verification.hint: Admins review verification requests after your academic details are complete.
verification.pendingDescription: Your profile is ready. Request verification when you want an admin to review it.
verification.missing: We could not find a profile record for this account.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage your account, academic context, and preferences.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeSubtitle: Switch between light, dark, and system themes.

settingsPage.academicHelper: Update your university, college, and major to get personalized content.

notesPage.title: Notes workspace
notesPage.subtitle: Create, organize, and connect your notes from one place.

empty.title: Your notes dashboard is ready
empty.description: Start writing in the editor now while the full dashboard features are being wired.
